name: B.Tech Computer Science and Engineering
description: Focuses on programming, algorithms, data structures, operating systems, databases, computer networks and software engineering. Suits students who enjoy coding, logic, building applications and exploring core computer technologies.

name: B.Tech CSE with Data Science
description: Combines core computer science with data analysis, statistics, data visualisation and big data tools. Suitable for students who like working with data, discovering patterns and building data-driven solutions.

name: B.Tech CSE with Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
description: Includes fundamentals of computer science along with artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning and related tools. Ideal for students interested in intelligent systems, automation and AI-based applications.

name: B.Tech CSE with Cyber Security
description: Emphasises secure programming, network security, cryptography, ethical hacking and digital forensics. Fits students who are curious about protecting systems, analysing vulnerabilities and working as security professionals.

name: B.Tech Electronics and Communication Engineering
description: Covers electronic circuits, communication systems, signal processing, embedded systems and related technologies. Appropriate for students interested in electronics, communication devices, IoT and hardware-software integration.

name: B.Tech Electrical and Electronics Engineering
description: Focuses on power generation, transmission and distribution, electrical machines, control systems and power electronics. Good for students who like working with power systems, electrical infrastructure and industrial automation.

name: B.Tech Mechanical Engineering
description: Deals with mechanics, thermodynamics, machine design, manufacturing processes and production engineering. Suitable for students who are interested in machines, automotive systems, design and core mechanical industries.

name: B.Tech Civil Engineering
description: Concentrates on structural engineering, construction materials, surveying, transportation engineering, water resources and environmental aspects. Ideal for students who want to work on infrastructure, buildings and public works.

name: M.Tech Computer Science and Engineering
description: A postgraduate programme focusing on advanced areas of computer science including algorithms, distributed computing, data engineering and research-oriented subjects. Suitable for graduates seeking specialised technical roles or academic careers.

name: M.Tech CAD/CAM
description: Covers computer-aided design and computer-aided manufacturing, with emphasis on modelling, simulation and mechanical design automation. Suitable for students with a mechanical background who like design and manufacturing technologies.

name: M.Tech Embedded Systems
description: Focuses on embedded controllers, real-time systems, hardware-software co-design and applications in electronics and automation. Ideal for students who enjoy low-level programming and working close to hardware.

name: M.Tech Power Electronics
description: Deals with power electronic converters, drives and control of power systems. Fits students interested in advanced electrical and power electronics engineering roles.

name: M.Tech Structural Engineering
description: Specialises in analysis and design of concrete and steel structures, earthquake-resistant design and advanced structural engineering topics. Suitable for civil engineering graduates who want to work in design and consultancy.

name: Master of Business Administration
description: Two-year programme covering management fundamentals such as finance, marketing, human resources and operations. Appropriate for students who want careers in management, leadership and business roles in different sectors.

name: Master of Computer Applications
description: Postgraduate programme concentrating on application development, software engineering and advanced computing concepts. Best suited for graduates aiming at careers in software development and IT services.

name: Diploma in Civil Engineering
description: Introduces fundamentals of civil engineering, surveying, construction materials and basic structural concepts. Suitable for students who want an early entry into construction and infrastructure fields.

name: Diploma in Computer Engineering
description: Provides foundation in computer hardware, basic programming, networking and operating systems. A good starting point for students seeking technician or support roles in IT and computer labs.

name: Diploma in Electronics and Communication Engineering
description: Focuses on basics of electronics, communication circuits and instrumentation. Suitable for students who want to work as technicians in electronics, telecom or related industries.

name: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering
description: Covers fundamental concepts of electrical machines, wiring, power systems and basic electronics. Fits students interested in electrical maintenance and technician roles.

name: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering
description: Provides core knowledge in mechanical systems, workshop practices and basic design concepts. Suitable for students who want hands-on roles in manufacturing and mechanical industries.
